# Nevada Online Privacy Law

Jurisdiction: United States - Nevada
Region: US-NV
Citation: Nevada Revised Statutes Chapter 603A
Authority: Nevada Legislature
Source URL: https://www.leg.state.nv.us/NRS/NRS-603A.html
Topics: notice_transparency, marketing_opt_out, third_party_sharing
Keywords: Nevada privacy law, sale opt-out, covered information

## Summary
Nevada online privacy law requiring privacy notices and sale opt-out mechanisms for covered operators.

## Key compliance obligations
- Publish required online privacy notice.
- Provide sale opt-out request address where applicable.
- Track covered-information categories and third-party sharing.
